name: Samidorphan
description: Samidorphan has been used in trials studying the treatment of Schizophrenia, Alcohol Dependence, and Binge Eating Disorder.

interactions.name: Methylnaltrexone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Samidorphan is combined with Methylnaltrexone.

interactions.name: Naloxegol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Samidorphan is combined with Naloxegol.
